title: poa thomasii
intro: Poa thomasii, also known as blue fescue grass, is a perennial grass species native to the mountainous regions of the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions. Poa thomasii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
